description: Accounts in a mixture of Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic in Arabic script. Mentions mainly textile goods in various colors, and of the ṭabaristān type. Numerals are written both in Hebrew script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentions people such as a faqīh; Ṣāliḥ; Manṣūr; and ʿAbdallāh.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
